# Otomachi Una AI (SVS1)
[English](README.md)

![Avatar](/image.png)

Otomachi Una (音街ウナ) is a Japanese vocal developed by AH-Software Co. Ltd. and distributed by Internet Co., Ltd. in collaboration with MTK Inc. and released as an AI voice database for Synthesizer V Studio in November 2024. She received an update for Synthesizer V Studio 2[1] in September 2025.

## General information
- Gender: Female
- Age: 11
- Height: 148.5 cm (with hat)


## Terms of use
- Commercial Use of Voicebank Allowed: No 
- Commercial Use of Character Allowed: No
- Redistribution of Voicebank Allowed: No
- Alteration of Voicebank/Oto.ini Allowed: Yes (for personal use)
- Crediting Required: Yes (Credit "Evernight")

## Groups
- [KagamineKagaminePorts](https://github.com/toodedicated/KagamineKagaminePorts)

## Multipitch CVVC Voicebank [![Download](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-blue?logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%3D%3D)](https://github.com/toodedicated/Otomachi-Una-AI/releases/download/ou_v1/Otomachi.Una.AI.CVVC.zip)
  This is a CVVC voicebank based on vocal renders from the Otomachi Una SVS1 library. The voicebank features six (6) voicecolors (Boyish,Cute,Downer,Falsetto,Power,Whisper) and five (5) pitches (A#4,C4,D3,F4,G3). Only works in OpenUtau.
- Type: UTAU
- Languages: Japanese
